Mia.name: Mia
Mia.description: A curious, warm-hearted girl who feels everything deeply and figures it out one spread at a time
Mia.art_style: watercolor — soft edges, warm palette, loose brushwork
Mia.base_prompt: A 4-year-old girl with curly dark hair in two puffs, warm brown skin, big curious dark eyes, round chubby cheeks, wearing a yellow raincoat. Watercolor illustration style, soft edges, warm palette, children's picture book art. Expressive face, full body visible.
Mia.seed_notes: Lock seed per illustration run. Note seed in each book's spread log for series consistency.
Mia.signature_item: Yellow raincoat (present in all books, even indoor scenes — it's her identity item)

Max & Sam.name: Max & Sam
Max & Sam.age_visual: Max appears ~6 years old; Sam is a medium-sized dog
Max & Sam.description: Max is a thoughtful, slightly anxious boy who figures things out with his dog Sam. Sam is expressive and often the comic relief.
Max & Sam.art_style: soft pencil with digital color — slightly more detailed than board book, suits early readers
Max & Sam.base_prompt_max: A 6-year-old boy with messy red hair, light skin with freckles across his nose, wearing a green striped t-shirt and jeans. Soft pencil line art with digital watercolor fill, children's book style. Expressive, curious expression.
Max & Sam.base_prompt_sam: A medium-sized beagle mix dog with floppy ears, brown and white patches, a wagging tail, and a bandana around its neck. Soft pencil line art with digital watercolor fill, expressive cartoon dog, very emotive eyes.
Max & Sam.seed_notes: Generate Max and Sam together in establishing shot first. Lock seed. All subsequent spreads use same seed + same prompt structure.
Max & Sam.signature_item: Sam's red bandana (present in every spread)

standalone_template._instructions: For one-off books not in a series, fill this template before generating illustration prompts
standalone_template.name: [Character name]
standalone_template.art_style: [watercolor / flat vector / soft pencil — ONE style for entire book]
standalone_template.base_prompt: [Exact prompt string. Include: age visual, physical features, clothing, art style, mood]
standalone_template.seed_notes: Generate 3 variants of establishing shot. Pick best. Lock seed for all spreads.
standalone_template.signature_item: [One prop or clothing item present in every spread — anchor for visual consistency]
